economic_hypothesis: A past-only change in the average size and count composition of ES aggressive prints can distinguish concentrated urgent inventory transfer from distributed participation; liquidity suppliers or late aggressive followers can pay delayed continuation, while large aggressive effort that fails to move price can pay an absorption reversal.
who_pays: Liquidity suppliers who adjust inventory after a change in aggressive clip composition, late followers who extrapolate an absorbed large-print impulse, and participants whose execution schedule persists beyond the completed signal minute.
persistence_rationale: The state compares the completed minute with medians from the immediately preceding completed RTH session of the same explicit contract. It uses trade-size composition inside one clock and does not reuse cross-clock agreement, cross-clock speed leadership, or mini/micro divergence.

source.baseline: median of average_trade_size, trade_count, and absolute signed_aggressor_fraction over the immediately preceding completed RTH session of the same explicit contract
source.average_trade_size: total_volume / trade_count; rows with trade_count <= 0 are ineligible

motifs.definition: average_trade_size crosses strictly above the preceding-session median while signed_aggressor_volume is nonzero; direction is the completed minute aggressive-flow sign

average_trade_size and absolute signed_aggressor_fraction are strictly above their preceding-session medians while completed-minute price change is zero or opposes nonzero aggressive flow; trigger only on state onset and reverse the aggressive-flow sign

average_trade_size is strictly below its preceding-session median, trade_count is strictly above its preceding-session median, and completed-minute price change agrees with nonzero aggressive flow; trigger only on state onset

signal_policy.decision_timestamp: availability_ns of the completed source minute
signal_policy.entry: first explicit-contract 1m open at or after decision timestamp
signal_policy.exit: explicit-contract 1m open at entry plus frozen holding_minutes
signal_policy.state_onset: current state true and immediately preceding contiguous minute in the same contract/session false

CONTRE: The prior-session medians may mostly encode ordinary intraday activity normalization; the motif can still be a generic volatility geometry proxy, and a green development result cannot advance without the permanent grammar tripwire and candidate-specific power audit.
